headline: Top Wind Energy Stocks to Watch Amid Increased Adoption of Clean Energy
summary: Wind energy growth and rising clean power demand are putting CEG, DUK, PCG and DTE in focus for investors.

headline: Why Is OGE Energy (OGE) Up 1.8% Since Last Earnings Report?
summary: OGE Energy (OGE) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.
